requirement_topic.en: Bahrain Solar PV Market Access and Import Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 巴林光伏市场准入和进口要求
requirement_topic.zht: 巴林光伏市場准入和進口要求

summary.en: Bahrain's MOIC oversees general product import controls, while EWA administers the material-approval list for solar PV equipment used in its distribution network. Bahrain does not operate a standalone mandatory product certification scheme for all solar inverters at the import stage equivalent to, for example, China CQC or European CE marking for inverters. The operative requirement for export-to-project is EWA material-approval for grid-connected and net-metering applications. Bahrain targets 255 MW of solar by 2025 from net metering, tenders, and mandatory building requirements, with a national target of 300 MW net-metering capacity by 2026 and broader renewable energy goals under the National Renewable Energy Action Plan.
summary.zh: 巴林工业与商业部（MOIC）负责总体产品进口管控，EWA管理用于其配电网络的太阳能光伏设备物料认可名单。巴林在进口阶段对所有光伏逆变器并不实施类似中国CQC或欧洲CE标志的独立强制产品认证体系。面向项目出口的实际要求是针对并网和净计量应用的EWA物料认可。巴林设定了至2025年通过净计量、招标和建筑强制要求实现255MW太阳能装机的目标，并将2026年净计量容量目标设定为300MW，并在《国家可再生能源行动计划》框架下设有更广泛的可再生能源目标。
summary.zht: 巴林工業與商業部（MOIC）負責總體產品進口管控，EWA管理用於其配電網絡的太陽能光伏設備物料認可名單。巴林在進口階段對所有光伏逆變器並不實施類似中國CQC或歐洲CE標誌的獨立強制產品認證體系。面向項目出口的實際要求是針對併網和淨計量應用的EWA物料認可。巴林設定了至2025年通過淨計量、招標和建築強制要求實現255MW太陽能裝機的目標，並將2026年淨計量容量目標設定為300MW，並在《國家可再生能源行動計劃》框架下設有更廣泛的可再生能源目標。

standards_or_laws: Bahrain National Renewable Energy Action Plan
EWA material-approval process for solar PV equipment

summary.en: China solar PV inverter exports may carry China Quality Certification (CQC), China Compulsory Certification (CCC is not applicable to inverters), or third-party IEC test reports. CQC and China-domestic certifications have no standing in Bahrain's EWA material-approval process.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口可能持有中国质量认证（CQC）、中国强制认证（CCC不适用于逆变器）或第三方IEC测试报告。CQC和中国国内认证在巴林EWA物料认可流程中不具效力。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口可能持有中國質量認證（CQC）、中國強制認證（CCC不適用於逆變器）或第三方IEC測試報告。CQC和中國國內認證在巴林EWA物料認可流程中不具效力。

standards_or_laws: CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) voluntary certification
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 third-party test reports from accredited laboratories

gap.en: There is no shortcut from China domestic CQC or GB/T certification to Bahrain EWA material-approval. Exporters must submit EWA material-approval applications for each inverter model intended for Bahrain net-metering or grid-connected projects. IEC 62109 accredited-lab reports in English are the expected technical evidence package.
gap.zh: 中国国内CQC或GB/T认证与巴林EWA物料认可之间没有捷径。出口商须针对拟用于巴林净计量或并网项目的每个逆变器型号提交EWA物料认可申请。英文IEC 62109认可实验室报告是预期的技术证据资料包。
gap.zht: 中國國內CQC或GB/T認證與巴林EWA物料認可之間沒有捷徑。出口商須針對擬用於巴林淨計量或併網項目的每個逆變器型號提交EWA物料認可申請。英文IEC 62109認可實驗室報告是預期的技術證據資料包。

mandatory_status.target: EWA material-approval listing mandatory for grid-connected and net-metering projects; no single mandatory import-level inverter certificate confirmed in public sources
mandatory_status.cn: CQC voluntary; CCC not applicable to inverters; IEC test reports recommended for export

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Authority (EWA), Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain's growing solar market (300 MW net-metering target by 2026) requires EWA material-approval for each inverter model. Chinese domestic certifications do not transfer. Budget time for EWA material-approval application before first project delivery.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林不断增长的太阳能市场（2026年净计量目标300MW）要求每个逆变器型号取得EWA物料认可。中国国内认证不可转用。在首个项目交付前，为EWA物料认可申请预留时间。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林不斷增長的太陽能市場（2026年淨計量目標300MW）要求每個逆變器型號取得EWA物料認可。中國國內認證不可轉用。在首個項目交付前，為EWA物料認可申請預留時間。
